LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS SALIM SHAMI, AND INAM SHAMI'S (TRUSTEES OF THE SHAMI FAMILY TRUST) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT ARISES FROM DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION, AT LEAST AS TO PLAINTIFF'S AGREEMENT TO ACCEPT LATE RENT DURING APRIL 2008 AND WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS IN BREACH OF THE WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR DONEWALD, CHRISTOPHER J. AS ATTORNEY FOR SMITH, CHARMAYNE
